pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly setting SOURCE_ORK and TARGET_ORK
Verified via export_result.sh explicitly looking for TARGET_ORK
Verified via export_result.sh explicitly exporting memo_size from MEMO_PATH
Verified via verifier.py logic explicitly checking against expected length of 2.0 meters
Verified via verifier.py logic explicitly checking velocity >= 18.0 m/s
Verified via verifier.py logic explicitly checking apogee <= 1200 meters
Verified via verifier.py docstring explicitly stating Pass threshold: 70 points

privileged_info_summary: The data is derived from a real 3D-printed rocket design available on GitHub (3dp-rocket/rockets). The setup script successfully strips original motor configurations to enforce task constraints. I confirmed that the verifier correctly mandates a 2.0-meter launch rod, clearance velocity of >= 18.0 m/s, apogee <= 1200 meters, and a passing score threshold of 70 points. All file paths match the expected output requirements defined in the export script.
